strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React matching primary stack
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, custom test runner (Trial), and assertion library
concerns: Resume lists JavaScript/TypeScript and Java but no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions
Limited explicit cloud/Kubernetes depth shown (AWS CDK mentioned, but GCP/Azure absent)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less recent time in the primary stack
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well above the 6+ year bar, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node/React experience, a strong testing culture, and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP work that aligns with the role's internal automation tooling focus. Gaps are mostly framework-specific (Nest.js, Vitest) and cloud breadth, but the underlying engineering foundation and language polyglot profile fit the requirements well.
